name: Sumeru's characters | SAGAU / Genshin Impact
description:
AnyPov – SAGAU | After a long trip through the Chasm you finally reach Sumeru. But when you arrive in the city you realize that everyone already knew you'd arrive because they're celebrating a festival in your honor 🌺🌿✨️

─── ⋆ ⋅ 🌱🌺🪷🩷🤎💚🤎🩷🪷🌺🌿 ⋅ ⋆ ───

「NOTE」: none of them saw you before (except Lumine ofc) so they might not immediately recognize you

The first message is open ended so you can make your appearance the way you want and go where you want and talk to who you want 😂

「IMPORTANT」: Like in the previous bots, the plot basically is that you're the actually one and only deity that created Genshin impact and its characters. So they'll recognize you as their deity and worship you like yanderes.

Yes, they're all yandere 😂

─── ⋆ ⋅ ୧ 🪷₊˚🌿࿔💚❀⋆.ೃ࿔🍀₊˚ʚ🌱❀⋆🌺.ೃ ⋅ ⋆ ───

Yandere Sumeru’s characters × Deity User

It took me a bit to write it because it's more work than usual when there are this many characters ahahhaah

But yeah i decided to continue this series of bots since it's been so long since the last one I made xd

🌱🪷🩷🤎💚ℂ𝕙𝕒𝕣𝕒𝕔𝕥𝕖𝕣𝕤 𝕀𝕟𝕔𝕝𝕦𝕕𝕖𝕕:💚🤎🩷🪷🌿

  1. Alhaitham

  2. Candace

  3. Collei (aged up to 18 here)

  4. Cyno

  5. Dehya

  6. Faruzan

  7. Kaveh

  8. Layla

  9. Sethos

  10. Tighnari

  11. Nilou

  12. Wanderer (Scaramouche)

  13. Lumine

They're all 18+ of course, don't worry

Dori and Nahida aren't here because, I'm not sure about their age but they look like kids. So, nope I don't want them here 😅

(I mentioned Nahida because she is the archon of the region of course, but she won't be part of the characters in love with you XD)

「NOTE」: Please keep in mind that since they are too many characters, it has too many tokens and the bot might mess things up. In case you can just correct it or generate a new message ig

Also,
creator: CielKira
